use_cases: Displaying loading state during page transitions or route changes
Indicating async data fetching or API calls in progress
Showing content lazy loading status in web applications
Providing visual feedback during initial app or component mounting
Enhancing user experience during file uploads or processing operations
ai_summary: A neon matrix-style grid loader featuring a 3x3 animated square grid with cyan-blue-indigo gradients, pulsing glow effects, and staggered rotation animations. Includes loading text with bouncing dot indicators for a futuristic tech aesthetic suitable for SaaS, dev tools, and gaming applications.
